feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error to change BA in asset master data
entry.content: Please be advised that the Business Area within the Asset Master Data will be updated using transaction AS02. This change will be implemented by creating a new time-dependent interval to preserve the historical audit trail for the existing asset.

entry.title: Assigning fixed assets to functional location
entry.content: How do I assign a fixed asset to a functional location?  Am I able to assign more than one asset to the same functional location?

entry.title: PSMASSCREATE_PROJ text-105 nur in Englisch vorhanden
entry.content: Der Text-105 im Standardprogramm PSMASSCREATE_PROJ ist nur auf Englisch verfügbar nicht auf Deutsch. System QS/4 100

entry.title: pedido permanece en estado bloqueado (indicador “B”) a pesar de que el workflow
entry.content: In SAP MM (Materials Management), the standard purchase order release process prevents final release (transition from “Blocked” (B) to “Released” (G)) if there are inconsistencies in price determination that prevent the correct calculation of the net value of the purchase order. This behavior is not an error or an arbitrary restriction, but rather a standard SAP control mechanism designed to ensure the financial integrity of the document. As a result, SAP automatically recalculates the release status (field EKKO-FRGKE) each time a purchase order is saved, and if it detects that the net value is inconsistent or cannot be properly determined, it forces the release indicator to remain in “B” (blocked). This dynamic re‑evaluation occurs through internal routines (such as the standard functions ME_PRICING and ME_REL_STRATEGIE_EKKO during the save process), and prevents the release status from being manually manipulated (even via debugging), since any manual change will not persist: the system will overwrite the indicator according to the actual document conditions at the time of saving.

entry.title: Looking to understand operational dependency challenges in SAP environments
entry.content:
I’m researching operational support challenges in SAP environments, especially around incidents that require coordination across multiple teams or systems.

I’d love to understand from real project/support experience:

  • What types of SAP incidents take the longest to diagnose?
  • Which issues usually require multiple teams (EWM/MM/BASIS/MES/integration/etc.)?
  • How do teams currently assess downstream impact before making changes?
  • Are there recurring situations where tribal knowledge becomes critical?
  • Have you experienced production issues caused by transports, integrations, queue failures, or configuration changes that unexpectedly affected other processes?
  • How do you currently document cross-system operational dependencies?
  • What operational visibility do you feel is missing today?

Interested in hearing real examples from support projects, warehouse operations, manufacturing integrations, or AMS environments.

entry.title: A delivery note when created should trigger the automatic email to multiple email id's maintained i
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
In SD module we have a got a new requirement from user provided it is fulfilled only using standard solution
Requirement : A delivery note when created should trigger the automatic email to multiple email id's maintained in the BP.
My analysis:
- In NACE->Application V2-> output type:ZD**-> Medium 5 - allows attachment but do not allow multiple email id's
Medium 7 - allows multiple email id's but do not allow attachment
- As per Clean core principles I am looking to find the Standard SAP Solution but I could not find anything
- We have a custom solution but the goal is to find the Standard solution to fulfill the requirement

Appreciate your feedback and efforts

entry.title: Asset accounting new fiscal year
entry.content:
Hello

Getting error "Fiscal Year change not yet made for co code XXX

When we try to close fiscal year 2024 in FAA_CMP , it gives error "contains assets with depreciation not posted" , but when we check in  AFAB in test run, there is no asset pending for depreciation posting in FY 2024. When we check the log, it shows no errors "fixed assets processed in total - success"

Then why are we getting the error and not able to close the FY 2024 or open FY 2026

Screenshots and issues are available in the attachment

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Guidance Needed for SAP Learning Journey and SAP Security Career Path
entry.content:
Dear SAP Learning and Community Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently studying for a Bachelor’s degree in Cybersecurity and IT at Rutgers University, and I recently received access to SAP Learning resources and certifications through my university opportunity.

I am very interested in becoming SAP certified and building a future career related to SAP, cybersecurity, enterprise systems, and emerging technologies. I am also actively learning and exploring AI, and I am very interested in understanding how AI, cybersecurity, and SAP technologies may connect in future enterprise environments.

However, I am currently a complete beginner in SAP and do not yet have prior knowledge of ERP systems, SAP modules, accounting concepts, FI/CO, MM, business processes, T-codes, or SAP terminology.

As I started exploring the SAP Learning portal, I found there are many learning journeys, modules, and specialization paths, which made it difficult for me to understand where I should begin and what sequence I should follow.

Since my academic background is in Cybersecurity and IT, I would sincerely appreciate guidance on the best SAP learning roadmap that aligns with my studies and long-term career goals. I would especially value recommendations related to SAP Security, GRC, governance, access management, enterprise security, AI-related SAP technologies, or other cybersecurity-relevant SAP areas.

I would be very grateful if your team could kindly guide me regarding:

1. Which beginner learning journeys I should start with from scratch
2. How I should learn ERP concepts, SAP basics, navigation, and business processes step by step
3. Whether I should first learn FI/CO, MM, T-codes, Internal Orders, Profit Centers, and SAP fundamentals before moving into SAP Security
4. The recommended sequence of courses and learning journeys for someone with a Cybersecurity and IT background
5. Which SAP certifications would be most relevant and valuable for my future career goals
6. Which learning journey could eventually lead me toward SAP Security or SAP GRC certification paths
7. Whether there are SAP learning paths that combine AI, enterprise systems, and cybersecurity concepts

My goal is to follow a proper structured roadmap instead of randomly selecting courses without understanding the correct direction.

I would sincerely appreciate your guidance and recommendations.

Thank you very much for your time and support.

Kind regards,
Inaya

entry.title: Local consumption of business event R_PurchaseOrderTP~ItemChanged failed
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

  I'm trying to consume this event of purchase order, it seems can be handled by event class, I noticed this BO is not released for S/4 2023 PCE, but as documented in Purchase Order Events | SAP Help Portal, it's released, for SO we can consume succeed, is there anything I missed? Or the API release is mandatory?

BRs,

Rhythm

entry.title: No Successor for FOR FIORI APP id F3556 F3557
entry.content:
Hi team

Please provide Successor Apps for FIORI APPS for application component BC-CCM-DAG-S4

Please assign this to correct component if not in correct component

F3556F3557

entry.title: No Successor for FOR FIORI APP id F3556 F3557
entry.content:
Hi team

We are planning for SAP S/4 HANA version upgrade from 2021 to 2025 

we generated SAP Impact Analysis FIORI Upgrade report so that we can find out about the impact analysis for FIORI APPS after the SAP S/4 HANA VERSION Upgrade.

In that report we found that FIORI APPS 

Please provide Successor Apps for FIORI APPS

F3556F3557

for application component BC-CCM-DAG-S4

Please assign this to correct component if not in correct component

F3556F3557

entry.title: Qty based discount
entry.content:
Is it possible to have a quantity based discount in a service po?

Is scales can be used for this kind of service po ?

entry.title: Power BI connectivity to SAP
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are in the process of integrating Power BI with SAP; however, we are facing an issue while connecting to the SAP system. The error details are attached for reference. We would appreciate it if you could advise on any required documentation, configuration steps, or SAP Notes that should be followed to resolve this issue and enable a successful connection.

Regards,
Prateek Prajapati

entry.title: activated MM_PUR_PURCHORD_REWORK_WFL in client-000 but it is not active in client-100
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

In client-000, we opened the client via SCC4 and SE06, then using transaction SFW5 we successfully activated MM_PUR_PURCHORD_REWORK_WFL in client-000. We don't see this function set activated in client-100. Shouldn't this activation be client independent? Can you please advice. 

Thanks,

Gus

entry.title: How to reduce the investment support for assets acquired in the current fiscal year
entry.content:
Dear expert，

As per business requirements, we plan to activate Fixed Assets – Special Valuation – Investment Support.However, we encountered an issue during testing:None of the transaction types in AO83 can realize the reduction of government subsidy amounts for assets acquired in the current year.Specifically, we need to perform a reverse posting for transaction type I**.

entry.title: SAP Fiori App Installation
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a Custom Fiori app using CDS View and ODATA and i can run it successfully from my local macine thro Visual Studio. When i try to deploy that app in s4 hana i get the below ERROR.

Can you please help!!

npm verbose cli C:\Program Files odejs ode.exe C:\Program Files odejs ode_modules pm in pm-cli.js
npm info using npm@11.12.1
npm info using node@v24.15.0
npm verbose title npm run build
npm verbose argv "run" "build"
npm verbose logfile logs-max:10 dir:C:\Users\NQ10073265\AppData\Local pm-cache\_logs\2026-05-11T11_04_28_740Z-
npm verbose logfile C:\Users\NQ10073265\AppData\Local pm-cache\_logs\2026-05-11T11_04_28_740Z-debug-0.log
npm warn Unknown env config "ui5-abap-password". This will stop working in the next major version of npm. See `npm help npmrc` for supported config options.
npm warn Unknown env config "ui5-abap-user". This will stop working in the next major version of npm. See `npm help npmrc` for supported config options.
npm warn Unknown user config "UI5_ABAP_USER". This will stop working in the next major version of npm. See `npm help npmrc` for supported config options.
npm warn Unknown user config "UI5_ABAP_PA

entry.title: How to change confirmation control key in PO, those has partial GRN completed
entry.content: The confirmation control key (Z001) needs to be updated in purchase orders that have partially completed GRNs.

entry.title: France B2B e-invoicing 2026 - correct eDocument process code in DRC (FR_B2B vs FRSINV)?
entry.content:
Configuring SAP S/4HANA for the French B2B e-invoicing mandate (PA/Y-model, September 2026). Two specific questions:

1. Process code: Is FR_B2B the correct eDocument process code for outbound B2B invoices under the France PA mandate, or is FRSINV still current? We understand FRSINV may be legacy Chorus Pro / pilot. Is FR_B2B_CRN the correct type for credit notes (avoir)?

2. SAP as PA: SAP was announced as a certified Plateforme Agréée in February 2026. Does this mean customers using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance cloud edition (BTP) can transmit without contracting a separate third-party PDP? Is this limited to DRC Cloud Edition only?

Context: deploying for a customer using SAP DRC. Would be interested to hear from practitioners on both On-Premise and DRC Cloud Edition.

Any practitioner who has gone live or is in active testing for France B2B PA would be extremely helpful.

entry.title: Discrepancy MB5B & report J3RFLVMOBVEDH
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are observing a discrepancy between transaction MB5B and report J3RFLVMOBVEDH for the same selection criteria.

Analysis performed:

* Verified material movements through MB51
* Checked stock in MMBE
* Validated valuation data in MBEW
* No obvious data inconsistency identified

Request you to help analyze:

1. Difference in calculation logic
2. Whether any SAP Notes exist
3. Expected standard system behavior

 

Thanks and regard,

Kapil Birajdar.

entry.title: the error message AAPO149 occurred in ABT1N
entry.content:
Hello,

As we created document in ABT1N with revenue in SAP HANA edition, and the error message AAPO149 occurred. But created the same scenario in SAP ECC edition, which would generate the accounting document successfully.

We checked the configuration,  the error message AAPO149 occurred seems be caused by the two company code (0003 and A001) assigned to the same company ID (ABCD), but we are not sure about this. Does this configuration make the different results because of the different ERP edition?
